name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.6.91 Area defaults and focus-project progress rules
label: Area defaults and focus-project progress rules
release_notes: Preloads the revised default Areas, locks focus-based projects from switching back to task-based while focus blocks exist, and excludes supporting/helper checklist items from project progress.
notes: Fresh Pathmark Sync sheets now preload the user’s revised default Areas: Body And Stability; Home, Relationships, and Admin; Making And Craft; Expression And Culture; Skills And Tools; Rest And Play.
Project setup and editing continue to support Task-based and Focus-based planning styles, with the project steps panel adapting to the chosen planning style.
Focus-based projects cannot be switched back to Task-based while focus blocks remain in the project.

Project progress now counts only primary project progress items/focus blocks and excludes supporting time blocks and helper checklist items, even when those supporting items are exported to Google Tasks.
Dashboard project progress wording now refers to project progress items rather than treating all Google Tasks checklist rows as project steps.
release_name: Area defaults and focus-project progress rules
